visual_description: In a hospital room, a woman in a wheelchair sits near a bed where another woman lies covered by a pink blanket, while a man stands beside the bed. A doctor in a white coat gestures with her hand raised, and another woman in scrubs stands nearby, with additional staff visible in the background. Everyone appears to be focused on the woman in the bed, with the man leaning toward her and the woman in the wheelchair looking forward.
